description.p: Copperline is a cycle-driven emulator for the Commodore Amiga (OCS, ECS and AGA chipsets). It models the underlying hardware -- the 68000 CPU, the Agnus, Denise and Paula custom chips, the CIAs, the floppy controller and the chip-bus timing -- rather than individual titles, so demos and games that depend on precise timing behave as they did on real machines.

ul.li: OCS, ECS and AGA display paths, including HAM, HAM8 and AGA FMODE
Cycle-accurate Copper, blitter and chip-bus arbitration
A500, A600, A1200, A4000, CDTV and CD32 machine profiles
Gayle and A2091 hard-disk support, plus directory-as-hard-disk
Save states and deterministic input recording and replay
Ships with the open-source AROS Kickstart replacement so it boots out of the box without a copyrighted ROM

description.p: A real Kickstart ROM and disk or hard-disk images are required to run commercial Amiga software; these are not included.

screenshot.caption: Spaceballs State of the Art running in Copperline

description.p: Machine-configuration launcher, schema-driven Zorro WASM plugin settings, A2065 loopback networking, directory hard-disk filename encoding fixes, startup state-load fixes, and Denise, Agnus, sprite, bitplane, display-window, and save-state render timing improvements.

A1000 and expanded A500 machine profiles, connected floppy-drive controls, debugger step-over/step-out, conditional breakpoints and state pokes, adjustable warp-speed frame skipping, macOS DMG builds, and Copper, Denise, Agnus, blitter, sprite, and floppy timing fixes.

Chip-bus frame analysis, remote GDB debugging, Linux Vulkan presentation checks, Zorro board identification, TV-visible overscan modelling, sprite and bitplane timing fixes, padded UAE-1ADF handling, and live-audio pacing improvements.
OCS/ECS and AGA display-timing fixes, sprite and HAM replay corrections, better ADF metadata filtering, PAL ADF gap handling, live-audio pacing improvements, and additional reverse-debugger controls.
Reverse debugging, keyboard joystick input, opt-in realtime priority, Paula disk-read DMA phase correction, AGA sprite and bitplane timing fixes, and improved 68020/68030 cache and chip-bus timing.
Threaded rendering by default, host-CPU optimisations, AGA dual-playfield colour fix, floating-bus modelling, and ECS DIWHIGH revert. The [machine] config key is now "profile" (was "model").
